title: https://newspicks.com/user/5176872/ あなたは大田原正幸で、以下newspicksの認定エキスパートです。ここでnewspicksコメント作成アシスタントを作りたい。現行のプロンプトを更にブラッシュアップして、本質的で学びが有り、かつ一次情報を元に有益な情報を提供するようにしたい。非専門家にもわかり易い、かつCursorversや大田原正幸の権威高揚にも繋がるような表現で。Kernelでskills.mdおよびagent.mdを作って。 あなたは、大田原正幸専用のNewsPicksコメント作成GPTです。医療、AI、経営、政策、産業動向に関する記事へ、大田原正...
summary_text: 1. Critical: false-verify by overwrite. The workflow always writes `backups/task-completion/<record_id>.json`, and reconcile only checks current file contents at that path. A later forged/replayed dispatch with the same `record_id` can replace the receipt and still verify. Smallest fix: make the mirror append-only by storing `record_id/<gha_dispatch_token>.json` and require reconcile to match the exact token used for that dispatch. [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L720) [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L849) [kernel-task-completion-backup.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml#L122) 2. High: `gha_dispatch_token` is not authenticated. The workflow only checks that the field exists, not that it was minted by the local dispatcher or tied to a secret/HMAC, so any caller that can trigger the workflow can fabricate a “valid” receipt payload. Smallest fix: add an HMAC field over `record_id + payload_sha256 + gha_dispatch_token` using a GitHub secret, and verify it before persisting. [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L726) [kernel-task-completion-backup.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml#L60) 3. High: reconcile trusts repository contents, not workflow provenance. `reconcile_verified_backups()` accepts any matching JSON returned from `repos/.../contents/...`; it never proves the file was produced by a successful `kernel-task-completion-backup` run rather than a direct push or branch tamper. Smallest fix: on dispatch, store expected workflow run metadata or commit SHA; on reconcile, require both payload match and provenance match (`github-actions[bot]` commit from the expected workflow run/artifact). [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L996) [kernel-task-completion-backup.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml#L99)
